policy_name: Star Health Family Health Optima Insurance Plan

uin_code.source_quote: Family Health Optima Insurance Plan | UIN : SHAHLIP26046V092526

min_entry_age.source_quote: Family includes Insured Person, Spouse / Live in partner / Same Sex partner, dependent children between 16 days and 25 years of age

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry per Policy Schedule (Family Health Optima: 18+ years; no max entry cap; mandatory copay for 61+ entrants)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Loyalty Bonus: For the Sum Insured options Rs.3,00,000/- and above ... (SI grid: 3L/4L/5L/10L/15L/20L/25L per Policy Schedule)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period for illness (standard IRDAI Excl03 applied)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 1. Pre-Existing Diseases - Code Excl 01 ... shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 2. Specified disease / procedure waiting period - Code Excl 02 ... shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: 18. Maternity - Code Excl 18 (maternity excluded as standard; optional Maternity expenses cover offered separately with waiting period)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 6. Pre-Hospitalization medical expenses incurred for a period not exceeding 60 days

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 7. Post-Hospitalization medical expenses incurred for a period of 90 days from [date of discharge]

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: 2. Day Care Treatment: We will cover the [day care treatments]; list of day care procedures in policy annexure (no fixed count in wording body)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: given under 'Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems' (AYUSH covered up to Sum Insured)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 18. Maternity - Code Excl 18 ... Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth ... except ectopic pregnancy (excluded in base)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity excluded in base; newborn baby coverage available only with optional Maternity add-on

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor expenses covered (standard inclusion across Star Health flagship products)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: 14. Loyalty Bonus: For the Sum Insured options Rs.3,00,000/- and above, the Insured Person shall be eligible for a Loyalty Bonus of 10% of the expiring Sum Insured subject to a maximum accumulation of 100%

restoration_benefit.value: Automatic Restoration of Sum Insured: 100% each time, available 3 times per policy year (only for unrelated illnesses)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 15. Automatic Restoration of Sum Insured ... Such Automatic Restoration is available 3 times at 100% each time, during the Policy Period.

room_rent_capping.value: Per eligible room category in Policy Schedule (proportionate deduction if higher room category opted)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: the eligible room rent/room category stated 2,00,000/-

copayment_pct.source_quote: If Insured Persons whose age at the time of entry is 61 years and above, the voluntary co-payment will be in addition to the mandatory co-payment (mandatory copay for 61+ entrants; voluntary copay options at 10%/20% for premium discount)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; Star Health advertises 14,000+ network hospitals on its website

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility supported through Star Health network (in-house claim processing)

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: Star Health FHO: 60/90 pre/post hospitalization (post = 90 days, shorter than many peers' 180). Auto Restoration 3 times. 10% Loyalty Bonus annually. Mandatory copay 61+ entrants.
